title: Crescent Butterfly Brand Identity
description: Building my own studio brand: a crescent-winged butterfly, a dusty-rose world, and a full identity system from cards to templates.
story:
Every designer's hardest client is themselves. Crescent Butterfly needed a mark that felt precise and a little wondrous at the same time, so I drew a butterfly whose wings are built from crescent moons, dotted like a paper-cut and embossed to catch soft light.

The palette grew out of the mark: a coral butterfly living on dusty-rose fields, with blush details and a deep crimson reserved strictly for type and accents. The rule is simple. Soft fields, one bright creature, and dark red only where a word needs weight.

The system now covers business cards, a letterhead, social templates and full brand guidelines, all built on the same quiet grid so every new piece feels like it was always part of the family.
